commands.review_summary:
The PR changes WebChat optimistic chat state handling so inline data URL previews for audio and document attachments become text placeholders instead of attachment preview objects.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +72. Total +78 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the fallback path from source: getChatAttachmentPreviewUrl can return attachment.dataUrl, and current appendUserChatMessage only substitutes inline data URL placeholders inside the image branch. I did not establish a real browser RangeError reproduction in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof is missing and the branch needs a rebase/port to current main, so the remaining action is human/contributor follow-up rather than an automation repair lane.

target.title: fix(ui): keep audio and document inline data URLs out of optimistic chat state
target.body:
## Summary

- Extended the `isInlineDataUrl` guard in `sendChatMessage` to cover **all** attachment MIME types (image, audio, document), not just images
- When a `previewUrl` falls back to an inline `data:` URL for audio (.m4a, .mp3, .wav, .ogg) or document (.pdf) attachments, the large base64 payload is now replaced with a short text placeholder (e.g. `Attached audio: recording.m4a`) instead of being embedded in Lit state where it triggers `RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded`
- Renamed `formatInlineImageAttachmentPlaceholder` to `formatInlineAttachmentPlaceholder` to handle all attachment types generically

## Fixes

Fixes #86738 — scope gap from #73360 / #82228 which only guarded image attachments against inline data URL embedding

## Verification

- All 63 tests in `ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` pass
- All 45 tests in `ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts` pass
- Added dedicated tests for audio and document inline data URL handling
target.author: xianshishan
